revision.comment: [[Template:Establishment category in country by century]] now only needs country parameters (via [[WP:JWB]])

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (3 members)
Text replacement - "(?<!<noinclude>)\{\{\s*[dD]raft categories\|([^}]+)\}\}(?!<\/noinclude>)" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|\1}}</noinclude> "
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=12th-century_establishments_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=12th-century_establishments_in_Japan for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{Establishment category in country by century|Japan|decades=yes}} {{Draft categories|
}} {{wikidata link|Q8090040}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:12th-century establishments in Japan]] [[ja:Category:12世紀の日本の設立]] [[ar:Category:تأسيسات القرن 12 في اليابان]] [[commons:Category:Establishments in Japan in the 12th century]] [[fa:Category:بنیان‌گذاری‌های سده ۱۲ (میلادی) در ژاپن]] [[hy:Category:12-րդ դարի հիմնադրումներ Ճապոնիայում]] [[ru:Category:Появились в XII веке в Японии]] [[simple:Category:12th-century establishments in Japan]] <!--categories--> [[Category:12th-century establishments in Asia|Japan]]
